IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (19796840.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT security analyst with a strong background in managing and maintaining application security, implementing security policies, and providing end-user support. Skilled in various technologies including PeopleSoft, Oracle, Siebel, and E-Procurement.
SKILLS: AS/400 Mainframe, audit reports, auditing, business owner, business process re-engineering, CCNA, Change Management, Citrix, coaching, continuous improvement, Client, customer satisfaction, database, Dell, documentation, E-Business, Financials 8.8, financial reporting, functional, Grants, HP, Hubs, HR, Information Systems, internal audit, IT management, IT support, ITIL, Mainframe, MCSE, MS Office, MS Project, SharePoint, migration, network, Novell, Oncology, Oracle Enterprise Manager, Oracle, PeopleSoft HRMS, PeopleSoft, PeopleSoft 9.1, PeopleSoft 9.2, PeopleTools, PeopleTools 8.51, policies, processes, Procurement, quality, re-engineering, reporting, requirements gathering, risk assessment, risk management, Sarbanes Oxley, SAS, Siebel, Sigma, SQL, strategy, supplier management, user support, user training, technical documentation, TOAD, troubleshoot, upgrades, validation, VPN, Visio
